interfaces.name: searchGlobalContent
interfaces.description: Search across projects, publications, datasets, and events from the global search bar and return top matches for quick navigation.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text entered by the user, e.g., 'freshwater biodiversity', 'pm2.5 urban air quality'.

parameters.name: maxPerType
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return for each content type.

interfaces.name: getHomeOverviewContent
interfaces.description: Get homepage overview content, including site purpose and counts of major content types.

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured or trending projects, publications, and upcoming events for homepage quick-entry cards.

interfaces.name: getProjectFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Projects page sidebar and toolbar.

interfaces.name: searchProjects
interfaces.description: Search and filter projects for the Projects page, returning cards with user-friendly display fields.

fieldwork_year.description: Filter projects whose fieldwork_years include this year.

team_size_bucket_id.description: Optional bucket id from team_size_buckets, e.g., '1_10'.

interfaces.name: getProjectDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific project for the Project Detail page.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: ID of the project to display.

interfaces.name: getProjectLists
interfaces.description: Get all project lists (comparison, bookmark, watchlist) to populate list selectors when saving a project.

interfaces.name: saveProjectToList
interfaces.description: Save a project to a new or existing project list. Creates the list if needed.

mode.description: How to choose the list: 'new' or 'existing'.

project_list_id.description: Required when mode is 'existing'. ID of the ProjectList.

new_list_name.description: Required when mode is 'new'. Name of the list to create, e.g., 'africa_freshwater_2018_22'.

interfaces.name: addProjectToCompare
interfaces.description: Add a project to the current comparison session (used by 'Add to compare' controls). Creates a compare session if not present.

interfaces.name: removeProjectFromCompare
interfaces.description: Remove a project from the current comparison session.

interfaces.name: getCompareSessionSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current comparison session and summary details for the Project Comparison page.

interfaces.name: clearCompareSession
interfaces.description: Clear all projects from the comparison session.

interfaces.name: subscribeToProjectUpdates
interfaces.description: Subscribe an email address to updates for a project from the Project Detail page.

parameters.name: email_updates_enabled
parameters.description: Whether email updates are enabled; usually true when subscribing.

interfaces.name: sendProjectContactMessage
interfaces.description: Send a message to a project team via the 'Contact project team' form.

interfaces.name: savePIContactToNote
interfaces.description: Save the principal investigator contact details for a project into a new note.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: Project whose PI contact will be saved.

parameters.name: note_title
parameters.description: Title for the new note, e.g., 'collaboration_ideas'.

interfaces.name: createBriefingFromProject
interfaces.description: Create a project briefing from the Project Detail page, including selected sections like objectives, methods, and key outcomes.

parameters.name: briefing_title
parameters.description: Optional title for the briefing; if omitted, a default based on project title is used.

interfaces.name: followProject
interfaces.description: Follow or unfollow a project for quick access (local user preference).

parameters.name: follow
parameters.description: True to follow, false to unfollow.

interfaces.name: getProjectQuickActionsState
interfaces.description: Get quick-action state for a project (followed, in compare, subscribed) to render buttons on the detail page.

interfaces.name: getPublicationFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Publications page.

interfaces.name: searchPublications
interfaces.description: Search and filter publications for the Publications page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Keyword query, e.g., 'pm2.5 urban air quality'.

interfaces.name: getPublicationDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific publication when navigating from a reading list or search results.

interfaces.name: addPublicationToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a publication to a new or existing reading list. Creates the list if needed.

mode.description: How to choose the list: 'new' or 'existing'.

reading_list_id.description: Required when mode is 'existing'. ID of the ReadingList.

new_list_name.description: Required when mode is 'new'. Name of the list to create, e.g., 'urban_air_quality'.

interfaces.name: getReadingListsSummary
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists with item counts for the Reading Lists page or header menu.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new empty reading list.

interfaces.name: renameReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and all its associations (publications remain in the system).

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetail
interfaces.description: Get details and items for a specific reading list for the Reading List Detail page.

interfaces.name: removePublicationFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a publication from a reading list.

interfaces.name: updateReadingListItemNotes
interfaces.description: Update notes/labels for a publication within a reading list.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: New notes text; empty string to clear.

interfaces.name: reorderReadingListItems
interfaces.description: Reorder items within a reading list.

parameters.name: ordered_item_ids
parameters.description: Array of ReadingListItem.id values in the desired order.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events page.

min_date.description: Earliest event date as ISO date string.

max_date.description: Latest event date as ISO date string.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events for the Events page.

start_date.description: Start of date range, ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

end_date.description: End of date range, ISO date string 'YYYY-MM-DD'.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event for the Event Detail page.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register the user for an event from the Event Detail page.

interfaces.name: addEventToMySchedule
interfaces.description: Mark an event as added to 'My Schedule' based on its registration.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Event to add to schedule. Uses the latest registration for this event.

interfaces.name: getMySchedule
interfaces.description: Get all events that have been added to 'My Schedule'.

interfaces.name: removeEventFromSchedule
interfaces.description: Remove an event from 'My Schedule'.

interfaces.name: exportSchedule
interfaces.description: Export the user's schedule as a calendar file or PDF.

interfaces.name: getDatasetFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Datasets page.

interfaces.name: searchDatasets
interfaces.description: Search and filter datasets for the Datasets page.

last_updated_min.description: ISO date string filter lower bound.

last_updated_max.description: ISO date string filter upper bound.

interfaces.name: getDatasetDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed metadata for a dataset, used when expanding a dataset entry.

interfaces.name: addDatasetToDownloadQueue
interfaces.description: Add a dataset to the user's download queue. Creates a download queue if none exists.

interfaces.name: getDownloadQueueDetail
interfaces.description: Get all items in the current download queue for the Download Queue page.

interfaces.name: getDownloadQueueSummary
interfaces.description: Get a lightweight summary of the download queue for header icons.

interfaces.name: removeDatasetFromDownloadQueue
interfaces.description: Remove a dataset from the download queue.

interfaces.name: downloadQueueAsZip
interfaces.description: Prepare and initiate a combined ZIP download of all datasets in the queue.

interfaces.name: getNotesSummary
interfaces.description: Get a list of all user-created notes for the My Notes page.

interfaces.name: getNoteDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single note.

interfaces.name: createNote
interfaces.description: Create a new standalone note or a note related to a project or PI.

interfaces.name: updateNote
interfaces.description: Update an existing note's title or body.

interfaces.name: deleteNote
interfaces.description: Delete a note that is no longer needed.

interfaces.name: getBriefingsSummary
interfaces.description: Get all briefings generated by the user for the Briefings page.

interfaces.name: getBriefingDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific briefing, including included sections and notes.

interfaces.name: updateBriefingSections
interfaces.description: Update which sections are included in a briefing.

interfaces.name: updateBriefingNotes
interfaces.description: Update additional notes for a briefing.

interfaces.name: exportBriefing
interfaces.description: Export a briefing as a printable document or PDF.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, scope, data sources, and funder information.

interfaces.name: getHelpContent
interfaces.description: Get structured help content for the Help page, including task walkthroughs and troubleshooting tips.

interfaces.name: getPolicyDocuments
interfaces.description: Get content for Privacy Policy and Terms of Use pages.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDownloadQueue
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current DownloadQueue or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCompareSession
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get the current CompareSession or create a new one.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveEnumLabels
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to map enum values (topics, regions, licenses, etc.) to user-friendly display labels.

helperFunctions.name: _getLatestEventRegistration
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create the most appropriate EventRegistration record for an event when adding to schedule.

helperFunctions.name: _buildDateDisplayStrings
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate human-friendly date and date-range strings for UI display.
